description: DMB Basel III prudential returns (capital, risk, liquidity, IFRS9, AML, governance).

formulas.description: CAR computation using Basel III custom function
sovereign net exposure equals gross less CRM
bank net exposure equals gross less CRM
corporate net exposure equals gross less CRM
retail net exposure equals gross less CRM
residential_mortgage net exposure equals gross less CRM
commercial_real_estate net exposure equals gross less CRM
past_due net exposure equals gross less CRM
other net exposure equals gross less CRM
Total credit risk RWA is the sum of class RWAs
Board should not be smaller than independent directors
Critical errors should not exceed warnings
